mapper.sql: id, provider_id, model_type, model_id, model_name, description, max_tokens, context_window, input_price_per_million_cent, output_price_per_million_cent, icon, is_default, status, sort_order, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT model_id FROM ai_model WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND status = '0' AND is_default = '1' AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_model WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND model_id = #{modelId} AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_model WHERE id = #{id} AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
